name: Met Fifth Avenue
notes: The encyclopedic Met. A full day; arrive early. Pair with Central Park.

name: Met Cloisters
notes: Medieval art in a reconstructed monastery overlooking the Hudson. Uptown, quiet, magical.

name: Studio Museum in Harlem
notes: Leading museum of art by artists of African descent.

name: Dia Beacon
notes: Vast minimalist/land-art galleries in a former Nabisco box-printing factory. Day trip up the Hudson.

name: Clark Art Institute
notes: Impressionist collection + Tadao Ando galleries and hilltop trails. Berkshires.

name: Mass MoCA
notes: Massachusetts Museum of Contemporary Art — huge converted mill campus. Berkshires.

name: Storm King Art Center
notes: 500-acre outdoor sculpture park. NOT the same as Storm King Mountain (the hike). Rent a bike on site.
